user_query:
We’re preparing to expand agent usage next week. Please run a preflight cost risk audit on our OpenClaw configuration in input/openclaw.json. Use a lightweight static review to detect missing budget fields, premium model defaults, oversized token ceilings, interactive/browser workflows, cron/recurring automation without budgets, and verbose/thinking modes. Then:

1) Write a machine-readable report to output/cost_audit.json with keys: score (0–100), verdict (PASS|WARN|FAIL), summary, findings (array of {level, area, issue}), recommendations (array), guardrails (array), and evidence (object with budgetHints, expensiveModelSignals, maxTokenSignals).
2) Also write a brief summary to output/summary.txt that includes two lines starting with “VERDICT: …” and “SCORE: …”.

Use only the provided config at input/openclaw.json. Do not modify the config. Make the guardrails explicit and actionable.
